  1. handlers
Contents
  1. Description
  2. Classes and Interfaces

Package handlers

package handlers
  • Class
    Description
    AddReservationHandler
    Handles server responses for adding a new reservation.
    AddSpecialDateHandler
    Handler for processing the response after adding a special date.
    AddWaitingHandler
    ResponseHandler implementation for handling the server response after attempting to add a reservation or waiting list entry.
    CancelReservationHandler
    Handles server responses related to reservation cancellations.
    CancelWaitingHandler
    Handles server responses related to cancellation of waiting list entries.
    ClientHandler
    ClientHandler manages communication with the server for all client operations.
    CreateOpeningHoursHandler
    ResponseHandler implementation for handling the server response when creating a new opening day in the system.
    DeleteOpeningHoursHandler
    Handler for processing the server response after attempting to delete weekly opening hours.
    DeleteSpecialDateHandler
    Handles the server response for deleting a special date from the restaurant settings.
    DeleteTableHandler
    Handles the server response for deleting a table.
    ForgotCodeGuestHandler
    Handler for processing the server response when a guest requests their forgotten confirmation code.
    ForgotCodeHandler
    ResponseHandler implementation for handling the server response when a user requests their forgotten reservation confirmation code.
    GetAllReservationsHandler
    Handles the server response for retrieving all reservations.
    GetAllTablesHandler
    Handler for processing the server response when retrieving all tables.
    GetAllUsersHandler
    Handles the server response containing a list of all users.
    GetAvailableTimesHandler
    Handles the server response for available reservation times.
    GetNearestAvailableTimesHandler
    Handler for processing the server response that contains the nearest available reservation date and time options.
    GetRestaurantSettingsHandler
    Handles the server response containing restaurant settings data.
    GetUserInformationHandler
    Handles the response for a request that retrieves user information.
    GetUserReservationsHandler
    Handles responses that contain a list of reservations for a user.
    InsertTableHandler
    Handles server responses related to inserting a new table into the system.
    LoginHandler
    Handles server responses related to the user login process.
    LogoutHandler
    Handles the logout process for the client.
    MarkNotifiedHandler
    Handles the server response for marking a reservation as notified.
    PaymentHandler
    Handles server responses related to payment processing.
    RegisterHandler
    Handles server responses related to user registration.
    ReportHandler
    Handles server responses related to reports and updates JavaFX charts in the ReportController with the received data.
    ReservationAffectedHandler
     
    ResponseHandler
    Represents a handler for processing server responses.
    SeatCustomerHandler
    Handles server responses related to seating a customer.
    UpdateRegularClosingTimeHandler
    Handles server responses related to updating the restaurant's regular closing time.
    UpdateRegularOpeningTimeHandler
    Handles server responses for updating the regular opening times of the restaurant.
    UpdateReservationHandler
    Handles server responses for update reservation requests.
    UpdateSpecialDateHandler
    Handles server responses related to updating special dates in the restaurant settings.
    UpdateTableHandler
    Handles server responses related to updating table information.
    UpdateUserHandler
    Handles server responses for user profile updates.
    WeeklyWaitingListHandler
    Handles server responses containing weekly waiting list entries.
